acceptance_criteria.text: Event bus module: typed TaktEvent with entity.action naming, eventBus.on() with wildcard support, eventBus.emit() called after every mutation in routes.ts. Activity logging refactored into first event subscriber.

triggers table with schema: id, board_id, name, event_types (JSON array), conditions (JSON), action_type (enum), action_config (JSON), enabled, created_at, user_id. trigger_log table with id, trigger_id, board_id, event_type, event_payload, result, error_message, duration_ms, executed_at. Auto-prune to 500 per board.
Webhook action: POST to configured URL with event+trigger payload, 10s timeout, 1 retry on 5xx/timeout, success/failure logged to trigger_log.
Run Artifact action: executes board-level sh/js/ts artifact with TAKT_EVENT env var, captures output in trigger_log (truncated 5000 chars), errors if artifact missing.
Notify action: creates notification entries for watchers/members/owner (excluding actor). notifications table with id, board_id, user_id, event_type, card_id, title, body, read, created_at.
Auto Action: move_card, assign_label, remove_label on card events. Infinite loop prevention: auto_action events marked _automated and skipped by trigger engine.

Notification API: GET /api/notifications (paginated, filterable), PATCH /api/notifications/:id/read, POST /api/notifications/read-all, GET /api/notifications/count, DELETE /api/notifications (cleanup). Built-in auto-notify for card watchers on key events.

SSE endpoint: GET /api/boards/:boardId/events streams board events + notification.created + trigger.executed in real-time via Hono streamSSE. Auth + board membership required. Max 10 connections per board.
Trigger API: GET/POST /api/boards/:boardId/triggers, PATCH/DELETE /api/boards/:boardId/triggers/:id, POST test endpoint, GET log endpoints (per-trigger and board-wide, paginated).
CLI: takt trigger list/create/show/update/delete/log/test commands. takt notification list/read/count commands.
UI Notification Bell: bell icon in board header with unread badge, dropdown with last 20 notifications, mark-as-read on click, mark-all-read button, SSE-powered live updates.

UI Triggers Management: gear icon in board header, triggers tab with list/create/edit/delete. Trigger builder with 4-step wizard (name+events, conditions, action config, review). Trigger detail with execution log.
UI Real-Time Board Updates: SSE connection on board load, live card/column changes from other users, 'Live' indicator, reconnection handling with fallback.
